case_title: RIGGS, C. JAMES VS BANK OF AMERICA, RESIDENTIAL LOAN DIV. (3388) et al

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO JAMES JONRS (B OF A) RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
